Veterans Benefits: North Dakota allows qualifying military retirement pay to be subtracted from state taxable income and offers a disabled veterans property-tax credit for qualifying service-connected disabled veterans and surviving spouses.
LGBTQSource: HRC MEI 2025 + MAP ND policy score
Description: Jamestown is a small central North Dakota city on I-94 with a local VA clinic, the University of Jamestown, low housing costs, and outdoor access around the Jamestown Reservoir and James River trails. It has very cold snowy winters, a conservative Stutsman County political profile, and practical arts, parks, golf, fishing, and regional service amenities.
